videos.title: Lifty Nick Skiing Mt. Bachelor April 12th 2011
videos.description: Nick is an awesome Lifty at Mt. Bachelor.  It is his first year skiing, and Lifty's don't ski too much, so I see him as a natural at skiing.  You watch and tell me.

videos.title: Ricki Swearingen 2012 OISRA State Championships - SL Run #1
videos.description: Ricki Swearingen's first run in the Oregon Interscholastic Ski Racing Association (OISRA) State Championship races at Mt. Hood Meadows on March 2, 2012.  Ricki won this first run of the 100+ girls in Oregon that qualified for the state championships.

videos.title: Cross-country ski community prepares for Loppet Cup, state tournament
videos.description: The Cross Country Ski World Cup Tour is about to make its stop here in Minneapolis. This week also contains the high school cross country skiing state tournament. Ren Clayton caught up with a top prep skier as the sport reaches a boiling point.

videos.title: Cross-country skiing in Downtown Portland
videos.description: Portland, Oregon's funky spirit is on display during the Stumptown Birkebeiner- an impromptu weather-triggered version of an 800 year old Norwegian cross-country ski race. Whenever a good snow storm is predicted for Portland, Win Goodboddy and his friends put the word out : if snow covers the streets, it's time for anyone and everyone to meet at Powell's books (at 9am!) for a ski race through the streets of northwest Portland. This story is from Oregon Field Guide on Oregon Public Broadcasting.
